title: Dart King
shopHint: 6 dart sets (Steel Tips, Brass, Neon, Dragon, Ice, Gold). Earn trophies at each pub venue.
description: Precision dart throwing at a rotating dart board. Tap to release dart from bottom. Bulls-eye scores maximum. Darts already stuck rotate with board — avoid them or it is game over. Three pub venues: Local Pub, Tournament Hall, Champions Arena — each with faster board rotation.
